chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 41 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply. 2. For orders on CMA No. 280/25 (Exp) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No. 281/25 (stay) 04.12.2025 Appellant remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. It is also noted that on previous date, adjournment was sought. It appears that the appellant is not interested in proceeding with this appeal, which is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending applications. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
